title: Act 2 Part 4 - The Legend of Heroes: Trails of Cold Steel II Walkthrough
markdown:
### December 27

* * *

[![ReverieimpostexCS5.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/e/e3/ReverieimpostexCS5.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:ReverieimpostexCS5.png)

| Recipe: Spicy Curry | Purchase the Curry Recipe Book from the General Store. |
| --- | --- |
| Recipe: Mixed Grill | Josef: Arseid Mansion |
| Book: Gambler Jack Reprint #13 | Purchase from Fortnum Books (Christie's Galleria 2F) (Bareahard) |
| Book: Gambler Jack Reprint #14 | Purchase from Fortnum Books (Christie's Galleria 2F) (Bareahard) |
| Book: Gambler jack II - Chapter 13 | Spare: Aurochs Fort |
| Black Records #5 | Lohengrin Castle, SW corner. (Second Playthrough only) |
| Quest: Father's Pocket Watch | Speak to Jackass at Jackass' Repair Shop (Roer) *Alisa must be in party. |

\- Advertisement -

| Name | Requirements |
| --- | --- |
| Toval [Page 3] | Automatically. |
| Emma [Page 3] | Automatically. |
| Paula [Page 2] | Speak to Paula at Courageous 1F - Hangar. |
| Dorothee [Page 2] | Speak to Dorothee at the Courageous 2F- Book Room. |
| Kenneth [Page 2] | Speak to Kenneth at Courageous 2F - Cafeteria |
| Klein [Page 2] | Speak to Klein at Courageous 3F - Weapon Shop. |
| Munk [Page 2] | Speak to Munk at Courageous 3F - Resting Area |
| Claire [Page 3] | Part of the "Hearts in Harmony" Quest line. |
| Hibelle [Page 2] |
| Instructor Mary [Page 2] |

When you regain control, explore the ship, go and speak to **Munk** and **Klein** at the third floor. This will update their character profiles. You can speak to Jusis on the same floor for a short event. Then go to the second floor and speak to **Dorothee**, this will update her profile. Then purchase the **Curry** recipe from her. Then speak to **Kenneth** in the cafeteria and talk to Emma or Celine for a short event. Then head to the first floor and speak to **Paula**. Play the Blade mini game to raise the Link EXP between your classmates. When your done, speak to Towa at the bridge area and set your destination to **Ymir**.

| Nightmare Tip |
| --- |
| A: 1st Two-Team Battle: At the end of this Act, you'll be forced to fight 2 consecutive battles, each with a different team. You get 2 guest characters to help you for story purposes (one per battle) to assist the Class VII members minus Sara. This translates into the need to bring a well-leveled, well-equipped party to each battle. However, in keeping with the economics, and bearing in mind that Def is not that relevant in Nightmare, there are only a few things you need to consider buying/making:10 weapons for the whole Class VII. SARA WILL NOT PARTICIPATE IN THESE BATTLES, so you don't need to count her in if you don't want to.Enough Attack Stacks (i.e. only the 3 Attack quartz) for those members with naturally high STR. Even if you don't intend to use them, now is a good time to assemble these quartz. (Members would be Rean, Laura, Gaius and Millium).Str and Spd Task Equipment. If you have the Fishing Points, get at least 4 Warrior or Gladiator Badge accessories from Kenneth in the Courageous or Annabel at Ymir's pub.A Canceler Set and a Dodge Set if you have not build them before. Canceler is for Rean, Dodge is for Fie.Make sure Rean, Laura, Fie and Emma have 2 slots in their ARCUS that are upgraded to Level 2 (one element-oriented, one non-elemental).B: Sepith gathering/Level Building: In order to fund the above requirements, you'll need 90 000+ mira and good amount of sepith, in particular Fire and Time. Time will be the hardest to come by, so spend it wisely. Spend some Water and Earth sepiths (in batches of 1000) if you need to reach certain amounts of mira, since they are the most common and are easily replenished.Where to get the sepith/levels? For story purposes, you'll be required to tackle the 3 remaining Shrines, use these chances to fight every possible enemy in the dungeons. You'll need to swap character to complete the Trial Chests inside (2 per Cave for a total of 6) so take those chances to do a little grinding.Ideally, you'll be aiming to have as many Fighter/Tanks and any other Class VII member on between Lv 107 and 109. That, plus Stacking will guarantee you'll rip apart the Chapter boss teams. With Impunity. On this Act, you have access now to the Four Tools. See the Advanced Strategies section for more detail.C: Rather you use Four Tools or not, Alisa will get the True Gladiator Belt as a permanent fixture on her EVERY TIME SHE IS AN ACTIVE MEMBER ON BOSS FIGHTS. Also, she will be permanently linked to Rean, switching only to Fie if you plan on using her. |

A new course is added to the Snowboarding mini game. Finish that course to get a **Passionate Rouge** accessory. Then go to Ymir Valley for an event. (**Note:** Quick Travel will not trigger the event. You need to manually enter Ymir Valley) Then head to the very end of the Valley, you will find Beryl, speak to her and she will join Courageous. Return to Courageous. You can speak to Beryl in the **Fortune Room, 2F**(southeast room). Beryl will act as a fortune teller, asking her will let you know your relationship status of your friends and **who is qualified for the final bonding event scene** for the **bonding trophy**.

**Legram**

Then speak to Towa and set your destination to **Legram**. Then go to the Arseid Mansion at northwest end of the map. Speak to Josef, the chef that is speaking to the maid, Josef will teach you the **Mixed Grill** recipe. Then go to the **Bracer Guild** and speak to **Klaus** or **Miles** to start one of the side quests.

####  [![SubquestCS2.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/3/3d/SubquestCS2.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:SubquestCS2.png) Side Quest: Mist Opportunity

* * *

Accept the request, and then go to the port area and speak to Klaus. You will need Emma in your party or else Klaus won't let you go to Lohengrin Castle. Go to the top of the hill to enter Lohengrin Castle.

[![Trails of cold steel ii lohengrin castle.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/thumb/1/18/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_lohengrin_castle.png/320px-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_lohengrin_castle.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_lohengrin_castle.png) [![Trails of cold steel ii black records 5.jpg](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/thumb/d/d3/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_black_records_5.jpg/310px-Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_black_records_5.jpg)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_black_records_5.jpg)

**Note:** If this is your second playthrough or higher, you can find the last book of Black Records on the bottom left corner.

Head upstairs, and go to the east side, you will find the **Chakravarti Gem** in a monster chest. Then go to the opposite side and pick up the **EP Charge IV** in the treasure, then enter the door nearby to the Left Wing. Pick up the chest on your way down, you will get a **Dark Emblem**. When you reach the end, you will find an orbment station, heal up and then fight the boss at the bottom center.

|  |
| --- |
| Lucifuge | HP: 156170 | Item Drop: None |
| Elemental Efficacy | 100, 100, 100, 100, 140, 80, 200 |
| Unbalance Efficacy | Slash: ★★☆☆ Thrust: ★☆☆☆ Pierce: ★☆☆☆ Strike:★★★☆ |
| In this battle, the boss will consistently summon Shadow Spirits to assist them. If you manage to defeat all of the spirits, the boss will focus on summoning more spirits rather than directly attacking you. These spirits tend to use arts, especially if you can't eliminate them quickly. In such cases, using your S-Craft can help you get rid of them instantly.One particularly troublesome aspect of this fight is the boss's "Soul Pinon" skill, which incapacitates one of your party members and slowly drains their health. Using an S-Craft to deal enough damage can force the boss to release your ally instantly. |
| Enemy List | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Shadow Spirit | EP Charge I | Curia Balm |
| Wandering Armor | Teara Balm | U-Material |
| Wandering Sword | Reviving Balme | U-Material |
| Dark Canine | Red Beast Flesh | Globby Fat |
| Death Slugger | Chitinous Shell | U-Material |
| Treasure List | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Chakravarti Gem | Lohengrin Castle - Entrance Hall |
| EP Charge IV |
| Dark Emblem | Lohengrin Castle - Left Wing |
| Client | Butler Klaus |
| --- | --- |
| Reward and AP | Youkai Gem, 4000 Mira, 4 AP |

[![MarginCS2Test.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/a/a4/MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

**Bareahard Section**

Afterwards, go to Bareahard. Then go to Fortnum Books at Christie's Galleria 2F and purchase the **Gambler Jack Reprints**. Then head to the Noble District, and go inside house #2, speak to **Bridget**, and call out **Alan** for Bridget to Join Courageous. Then go to the Central Plaza and enter Sorciere Restaurant. Go upstairs and speak to **Caroline**. Accept the request, then bring **Alisa** to your party. Travel to Station Street and go to the entrance of **Underground Waterway**, you will find **Theresia**. Speak to her and bring **Emily** to recruit her to Courageous. Theresia will let you access Level 4-5 for the Shooting Range facility, clearing all 5 levels will give you the [Cypher](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Arts_and_Quartz#Cypher "walkthrough/Arts and Quartz") Master Quartz. Now go to Artisans' Street and enter **Turner's Jewelers** and speak to **Colette**. Select the first choice to help her. Then go to **South Kreuzen Highway** and find four pieces of Dryad's Tear (it's marked with a **green exclamation mark** on the mini map). Once you have collected all the Dryad's Tear, report to Colette, and she will join Courageous. Head back to Bareahard, you can finally access **North Kreuzen Highway 2**, in there you will find a **new fishing spot** and a **Trial Chest** for **Alisa/Elliot/Laura/Jusis**.

[![Trails of cold steel ii north kreuzen highway 2.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/5/58/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_north_kreuzen_highway_2.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_north_kreuzen_highway_2.png)

| Trial Chest Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| King Falena x2 | 67392 (Normal) | 80, 100, 120, 140 | Adamantine Shield R, Confuse II | ★★☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ |
| Were Falena x4 | 12036 (Normal) | 80, 100, 120, 140 | Hearty Powder, Curia Balm | ★★☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ | ★☆☆☆ |
| Preparation | Accessory: Sleep resistant accessory on Elliot. |
| With a full party, you can easily wipe out the entire mobs with a your S-Craft. If not, then use Alisa's Heavenly Gift for Insight and CP Recovery. If the mobs attack, they will use a gas attack that can cause Sleep. So make sure you have Elliot with a Sleep resistant accessory in case if something goes wrong. |
| Enemy List | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Mad Weed | Crisp Onion | Globby Fat |
| Egg Viper | Clear Gelatin | Chitinous Shell |
| Were Falena | Hearty Powder | Curia Balm |
| Cursed Roses | Globby Fat | U-Material |
| Treasure List | Location |
| --- | --- |
| U-Material x8 | North Kreuzen Highway 2 |
| Golden Bell |
| Seiryuu |

When your done the activities listed above. You should travel to Aurochs Fort by going through the Aurochs Canyon path.

[![Trails of cold steel ii aurochs canyon.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/3/3e/Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aurochs_canyon.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:Trails_of_cold_steel_ii_aurochs_canyon.png)

| Enemy List | Item Drop 1 | Item Drop 2 |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Anteater | Fresh Milk | Red Beast Flesh |
| War Mantis | Chitinous Shell | Clear Gelatin |
| Stealth Turtle | White Beast Flesh | Chitinous Shell |
| Attack Dog | Red Beast Flesh | Globby Fat |
| Green Raccoon | Red Beast Flesh | U-Material |
| Horneater | Chitinous Shell | Red Beast Flesh |
| Zwordar | Hearty Powder | Red Beast Flesh |
| Treasure List | Location |
| --- | --- |
| Sepith x200 | Aurochs Canyon 1 |
| Celestial Balm EX | Aurochs Canyon 2 |
| Qilin |
| Impede 2 |
| Sepith Mass x700 | Aurochs Canyon 3 |
| Shadow Blade |

There will be a fishing spot right near the entrance. You can also find some good treasures along the way. A **Trial Chest** for **Machias/Jusis** on **Auroch Canyon 2**. Then the side quest monster on Aurochs Canyon 3.

| Trial Chest Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Elder Mantis | 48672 (Normal) | 100, 160, 100, 120 | Nightmare II | ★★☆☆ | ★★★☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ |
| War Mantis | 48672 (Normal) | 100, 160, 100, 120 | Chitinous Shell, Clear Gelatin | ★★☆☆ | ★★★☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ |
| Preparation | Formation: A line with Machias on top.Quartz: Give Machias Armor Set with Attack 2-3. Jusis equipped with the strongest Water art.Accessory: Death protection, True Gladiator Belt on Jusis. |
| Wipe out the mobs with Machias 2nd S-Craft if your Level is high enough. Machias then alternates between attacking normally and using Burst Drive. Jusis alternates between Water arts and Noble Command. Take advantage of the Zero Arts bonus, it will show up pretty frequent for this battle. |

####  [![SubquestCS2.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/3/3d/SubquestCS2.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:SubquestCS2.png) Side Quest: Canyon, or CAN'Tyon?

* * *

You can find the quest monster at the **southeast corner of Aurochs Canyon 3.**

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Volkeron | 146640 (Normal) | 120, 200, 100, 70 | Nightmare II | ★☆☆☆ | ★★★☆ | ☆☆☆☆ | ★★★★ |
| Preparation | Formation: Baiting with Fie on the Top.Quartz: All get Freeze/Freeze II if you have them. If Freeze 2 is not available, use Sleep. Make sure Emma has your strongest Water art.Accessory: Burn protection. Fie gets Task equipment to increase her Agl.Links: Alisa and Fie. |
| The boss has a ton of HP, but you can easily delay it with attacks from Fie. such as her Bullet Cyclone or Rean's Arc Slash. Then Rely on Water arts as your source of damage. The boss can be easily delayed, along with freeze. If you don't have those quartz, sleep also works pretty effectively against this boss. |

Defeat the boss monster and you will be rewarded with the **Rakshasha** quartz.

| Client | Prince Olivert |
| --- | --- |
| Reward and AP | Rakshasha, 3000 Mira, 4 AP |

[![MarginCS2Test.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/a/a4/MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

Then when you reach to Aurochs Fort, speak to **Rex**, bring **Fidelio** to recruit him to Courageous. Then head into the **Rest Area - Crescent Moon**, and speak to **Spare** behind the counter, he will give you a copy of **Gambler Jack II Chapter 13**.

**Celdic & Roer**

After this, head to Celdic. Bring Elliot to your party and speak to Rosine at the Chapel to start one of the side quest.

####  [![SubquestCS2.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/3/3d/SubquestCS2.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:SubquestCS2.png) Side Quest: Hearts in Harmony

* * *

Speak to Rosine with Elliot in your party. If you do not have Elliot, Rosine won't talk you. Accept her request. You will need to find people that are proficient with music for her. The people are:

*   Instructor Mary - Roer House #1 (2F Southeast) (This will also update her character profile)
*   Fiona - Garrelia Proving Ground - Store area
*   Andre - Street Musician on Bareahard Central Plaza
*   Hibelle and Bridget (You don't need to talk to them, but they must be recruited in order for you get the bonus 2 AP)

Once you have gather everyone, go to the Celdic Chapel, and speak to Rosine at the center, select the first choice when your ready. If you found every member, you get an extra 2 AP, if not then you get 1.

| Client | Rosine |
| --- | --- |
| Reward and AP | Zeram Powder, 4500 Mira, 3 (+2) AP |

[![MarginCS2Test.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/a/a4/MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

Then set your destination to **Roer**. **Have Alisa in your party** and go to **Jackass' Repair Shop**, and speak to **Jackass**, accept the request to start a hidden quest.

####  [![QuesticonCS2.gif](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/c/c1/QuesticonCS2.gif)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:QuesticonCS2.gif) Hidden Quest: Fathers Pocket Watch

* * *

Take Alisa to your party and accept the request from Jackass. To complete this quest, you'll need to talk to four sets of NPCs.

1.  Harves and Gregor - Entrance of Roer Institute of Technology (Roer 2F NW).
2.  Mine Chief Rudolf - Outside of Sachsen Iron Mines.
3.  Miner Aman - Inside Sachsen Iron Mines - Freight Station Area.
4.  Old Man Gwyn - Lake Lacrima by the Truck.

Once you've spoken to these four NPC groups, report back to Jackass to complete the quest.

| Client | Jackass |
| --- | --- |
| Reward and AP | Seraph, 4500 Mira, 4 AP |

[![MarginCS2Test.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/a/a4/MarginCS2Test.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:MarginCS2Test.png)

Afterwards, return to Courageous and report the quest you have finished to the computer terminal. Then work on the main story by finishing the remaining **Shrines**.

### Shrine Trials Part B

* * *

You will need to clear the other three Shrines. Read the [Shrine Trials Part A](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Act_2_Part_3#Shrine_Trials_Part_A "walkthrough/Act 2 Part 3") for navigating through the Shrines. When you reach to the end of the second Shrine Trial, you will fight **Magic Knight Heavy Ruby**.

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Magic Knight Heavy Ruby | 199127 (Normal) | 100, 100, 100, 100, 100, 100, 100 | N/A | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★★☆ |
| Preparation | Formation: Tank 2 with Jusis on Top.Quartz: Aside from Rean and Laura's basic Set (Canceler and Warrior), give them as much Spd as possible.Accessory: Task Equipment giving Spd and Str boost (prioritize on Spd).Links: Rean/Alisa. |
| During the start of the first phase if the boss takes the first turn, it will attack you or buff itself. If it buff itself it will gain a massive attack power and also will heal itself. Start by buffing yourself if not then use Arc Slash with Rean, Radiant Wings with Laura. Using Laura's Earth Cleaver will be your main source of damage source. When the boss' HP drop to 60-70K, spam your S-Craft to finish it off. If your party members don't consist of the members above, just focus on having a healer on the far back using an area heal, while your damage dealers using their crafts and arts to deal maximum damage. |

Then when you reach the end of the third Shrine Trial, you will be fighting Isla-Zeriel.

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Magic Knight Isla-Zeriel | 210210 (Normal) | 100, 100, 100, 100, 100, 100, 100 | N/A | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★★☆ |
| Preparation | Formation: Tank 2 with Jusis on Top.Quartz: Aside from Rean and Laura's basic Set (Canceler and Warrior), give them as much Spd as possible.Accessory: Task Equipment giving Spd and Str boost (prioritize on Spd).Links: Rean/Alisa. |
| You can use the exact same setup as fighting the previous knight boss. This boss battle is almost identical, with it having tiny bit higher stats than the previous boss. |

At the end of the final Shrine Trial, you will be fighting Grianos-Aura.

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Item Drop | Slash | Trust | Pierce | Strike |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Grianos-Aura | 249843 (Normal) | 90, 90, 90, 90, 110, 110, 110 | N/A | ★★☆☆ | ★★☆☆ | ★★★☆ | ★☆☆☆ |
| Preparation | Formation: Tank 2 with Jusis on Top.Quartz: Emma gets the Might Set. If you have them, give her too the corresponding Elemental Bell quartz and the strongest art of Time/Space/Mirage. Zeus Gem on Rean.Accessory: Freeze and Confuse resistant accessory.Links: Rean/Alisa. |
| At the start of battle, Emma will unlocked her second S-Craft. If you want to speed things up, Overdrive with Rean and Emma as soon as possible. Then Rean uses Spd-boosting and Emma Crescent Shell. She must re-apply on her every turn. When everything is set, the boss will get occasional turns if you don't equip the Zeus Gem on Rean. Even with the Gem, he will still get a turn every now and then. For that reason, have Emma use Crescent Shell on her next turn after the boss has attacked. Once Crescent Shell has been applied, she is to use your choice of arts. S-Crafts when the boss crosses the 60 000 HP mark. The boss has attacks that will cause freeze or confuse on your characters, makes you have freeze resistant accessory for this fight. |

When you have collected all four Zemurian Crystals, return to Courageous. Before, you do the next story objective, create the whole set of **Attack Ex-Orbs** and equip them on Valimar. Then create a backup save file at this point. You can speak to Emma or Celine at the Cafeteria for a short event. Then revisit any of Shrines if you miss a Trial Chest. This is also a great time for you to defeat the all [Cryptids](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Optional_Bosses "walkthrough/Optional Bosses") if you haven't done that yet. When you're ready, speak to **George** at the Courageous Hangar and select the choice in red to move the main story.

**Note:** All of your party members are automatically boosted to level 108 (Sara will be at 111) at this point if you haven't level them.

### December 30

* * *

[![ReverieimpostexCS5.png](https://cdn.staticneo.com/ew/e/e3/ReverieimpostexCS5.png)](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/File:ReverieimpostexCS5.png)

| Character | Requirements |
| --- | --- |
| Monica [Page 2] | Speak to Monica in Courageous 4F. |

| KEY BONDING EVENTS |
| --- |
| If you are planning on getting the Bonding trophies for multiple characters, you have two chances now to set them. You'll be given the chance to play one match of Blade with a Class VII member (plus Sara) and to choose a support for the next Mech Battle. Both events are worth 800 Link Exp and they both make your choice partners available for 'Chosen Partner Event' at the beginning of the Finale if said characters also have Link Lv 6 (6000 EXP or higher) with Rean. |

Attend the bonding event of your choice by playing a game of Blade with them at the leisure room. Read the description above for more information. Then head to the 4th floor and **speak to Monica twice**, this will update her profile and she will also give you a **Kaiser Burger**. If you have acquired every profiles listed so far, speak to **Alfin** at the 4th floor to receive the Phoenix Medal of Love. If you have acquired all three Phoenix Medals, Alfin will also give you the [Vermillion](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Arts_and_Quartz#Vermillion "walkthrough/Arts and Quartz") Master Quartz. If this is your **second playthrough and has already acquired the Vermillion Master Quartz, you will receive a Deus Gem**. You can also speak to Professor Schmitt at the Hangar for a brief scene. When you are all ready, go speak to Towa at the bridge and start the operation.

Assigned your party members, you will be split into two teams. Towa is a mandatory member for **Team A**, and Angelica for **Team B**. Any members that are not selected will be put into Team B. Make sure both teams are fairly balanced or else you might struggle in the upcoming boss battle.

If you did not meet the required Level nor have the best weapons for all of Class VII, your best bet is to put Laura and Fie on Team B with Machias, while Team A gets Alisa and Jusis (or Emma if you want to use arts) since their fight can be harder. If however, you have the best possible weapons, and your characters are Lv 107-109, all you need are 2 S-Crafts (not even buffed) per fight to wrap things up if you give all fighters the [Warrior Set](https://www.neoseeker.com/the-legend-of-heroes-trails-of-cold-steel-ii/walkthrough/Advance_Strategy_-_Stacking_\(In-Depth\)#Warrior "walkthrough/Advance Strategy - Stacking (In-Depth)") (minus Rean).

Then select your link partner for the Divine Knight Battle, **whoever you selected here is also one of the possible conditions for triggering the final bonding event for the bonding trophy**.

| Boss | HP | Elemental Efficacy | Idle Stance | Attack Stance |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Goliath B | 210000 (Normal) | 100, 110, 100, 120 | B:★☆☆☆ | LA:★★★☆ | RA:★☆☆☆ | B:★☆☆☆ | LA:★☆☆☆ | RA:★★★★ |
| Kestrel B | 160000 (Normal) | 120, 100, 110, 100 | B:★★★☆ | H:★★☆☆ | A:★★☆☆ | B:★★★★ | H:★☆☆☆ | A:★☆☆☆ |
| Regardless of your partner, go for the Goliath first to build CP. Make sure to heal when under half HP. As soon as you hit 200 CP, begin using Morning Moon. Since Kestrel is the fastest, it will be taking most of your counter-attacks. |

After this, make all the preparation you need in Trista. You can only adjust Team A. Then you ready, head to Thors academy and you will start Team B's battle first and then Team A after.

| Preparation | Formation: Automatic, you have no control on character placement.Quartz: Give Laura Impede 2.Accessory: Spd Boosting, Machias gets Gladiator Belt, Fie and Laura the Gladiator Headbands.Links: Laura and Fie. |
| Start with Laura's Brilliant Spin, this will gather all the enemies in one spot and then have Fie use Bullet Cyclone. This can easily cause status ailments and AT Delay on them. Angelica begins taking down Sariffa with Zero Impact. The have Fie will be using Bullet Cyclone on every turn while Machias spams Burst Drive. Laura sticks to Brilliant Ember to Mute Sariffa in case she gets a turn. After Sariffa has fallen, switch to using Earth Cleaver. Make sure you scan all of them if you are collecting the battle trophy. Just make sure you focus on Sariffa first since she is the toughest and can heal the party. If each boss drops below 50%, S-Craft is a safe way of finishing them off. If are not using this party, then make you focus on using skills that cause status ailments on them, such as Seal, they are extremely effective for this battle. |

| Preparation | Formation: Tank with Rean on Top.Quartz: If you have an extra one, choose between Attack 3 or Action 3 for Towa.Accessory: Spd Task Equipment on Towa.Links: Rean/Alisa. |
| Start with Towa's A-Detector. This lets you scan enemies and make elements 50% more effective. The have Rean cast Chrono Burst and then moves to either side of the enemy team and begins using Arc Slash. When everyone's position is set, begin using your strongest arts. Alisa sticks with using Heavenly Gift. When you have scanned everyone, use your S-Craft to finish them off. Focus first on Celestin since he is the toughest and can heal the party. If you intend on casting arts, make sure you cast them before Ferris, because she can Impede them. If are not using this party, then make you focus on using skills that cause status ailments on them, such as Seal, they are extremely effective for this battle. |

Afterwards, the game will accumulate all the AP you have earned through this chapter. If you acquire a total of **67 AP**, you will get a **S Rank**.
